purpose: Establish factual basis for Mode C generative visuals: hardware feasibility and determinism with fixed seed.
outcome: Runtime inference removed for Mode C. Visual generation is offline; pipeline consumes pre-generated PNGs with provenance sidecars. Determinism guaranteed by static assets and locked encoding profile.
decisions: Mode C does not run SDXL or any AI inference at runtime.
Governed PNGs are produced offline; provenance sidecar (schemas/provenance_schema_v1.json) and output_hash verification ensure integrity.
Scene clip encoding profile locked to match AVMergeEngine for deterministic downstream transcode.
